 There was an issue with removing this item from your saved content. Please try again. 

Foundry Architecture

Understand the guiding principles of Foundry's open architecture, security and cloud infrastructure setup.

 Register

 Already registered?

 Sign In 

 Cancel 

 Apply 

rate limit

Code not recognized.

 Activate

About this course

We are sunsetting this course and will no longer be updating its content; we recognize that some of the material in this course, including screenshots and references to training resources, may now be out of date. We are replacing legacy courses with a series of Speedruns and Deepdives displayed on the learn.palantir.com home page. We've found that this new approach is much more intuitive, effective, and enjoyable for users. This course will remain accessible throughout 2024 for referential purposes while we further develop new content. If you have any questions, please reach out to training-feedback@palantir.com . 

Have you always wanted answers to questions such as:

"What are the guiding principles behind Foundry's open architecture?"

"What is Palantir's approach to security and access controls?"

"How is Foundry's cloud infrastructure organized?"

During this video series, we will run through a brief introduction on Foundry architecture and dive into some of its foundational principles and components that deliver the Foundry platform.

 Course Prerequisites: 

None

Curriculum 0 hr 17 min 

 Foundry Architecture

 Foundry Open Architecture 0 hr 3 min 

 Foundry Architecture Foundations 0 hr 10 min 

 Foundry Architecture Diagram Overview 0 hr 4 min 

 Conclusion

 Next Steps 

 About this course 

We are sunsetting this course and will no longer be updating its content; we recognize that some of the material in this course, including screenshots and references to training resources, may now be out of date. We are replacing legacy courses with a series of Speedruns and Deepdives displayed on the learn.palantir.com home page. We've found that this new approach is much more intuitive, effective, and enjoyable for users. This course will remain accessible throughout 2024 for referential purposes while we further develop new content. If you have any questions, please reach out to training-feedback@palantir.com . 

Have you always wanted answers to questions such as:

"What are the guiding principles behind Foundry's open architecture?"

"What is Palantir's approach to security and access controls?"

"How is Foundry's cloud infrastructure organized?"

During this video series, we will run through a brief introduction on Foundry architecture and dive into some of its foundational principles and components that deliver the Foundry platform.

 Course Prerequisites: 

None

 Curriculum 0 hr 17 min 

 Foundry Architecture

 Foundry Open Architecture 0 hr 3 min 

 Foundry Architecture Foundations 0 hr 10 min
